command: Move-Item -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\Antigravity.lnk" -Destination "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\Shortcuts\Antigravity.lnk" -Force; Move-Item -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\Notion.lnk" -Destination "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\Shortcuts\Notion.lnk" -Force; Write-Output 'Shortcuts moved successfully: Antigravity.lnk, Notion.lnk -> Shortcuts/'
description: نقل الاختصارات Antigravity.lnk و Notion.lnk إلى مجلد Shortcuts
